#  Export a Commitment 
##  Background 
You can export an individual purchase order or subcontract to the supported file formats detailed below. This is useful when you want to print out a paper copy of a purchase order or subcontract when you want to obtain a [wet signature](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms).
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To export any purchase order or subcontract with its Schedule of Values:_
      * **Admin** level permissions or higher on the project's **Commitments** tool.   
OR
      * **Read Only** level permissions on the project's **Commitments** tool and you must be added to the **Privacy** drop-down list and the **Allow Users to see SOV Items** check box must be enabled on the purchase order or subcontract.
  * **Supported File Formats:**
    * Comma Separated Values (CSV)
    * Microsoft Word Open XML Document (DOCX)
      * **Due to file conversion rules,** formatting may shift slightly when the DOCX file is opened in other applications.
    * Portable Document File (PDF)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To export a commitments list, see [Export Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/export-a-commitments-list).


##  Prerequisites 
  * Create a Commitment


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  2. Click the **Contracts** tab.
  3. Locate the commitment to export in the table.
  4. Click its **Number** link to open it.
  5. After you open the commitment, the steps that are available depend on the experience you are using.
     * In Beta
     * Legacy Content


#####  In Beta
The steps below detail the steps to follow when using the Modernized Commitments experience. To learn more, see [Project Financials: Modernized Experience for the Commitments Tool](https://support.procore.com/tc/procore/Legacy/Release%5FDocumentation%5FArchives/2022/Project%5FFinancials:%5FModernized%5FExperience%5Ffor%5Fthe%5FCommitments%5FTool).
  1. In the commitment, click the **General** tab.
  2. In the top-right corner, click the Export button. Then choose one (1) of these options:
     * **PDF**. Generates a PDF copy of the commitment and opens it in a separate browser window. You can then save the PDF to your web browser's Download location or send the document to a printer. The PDF displays the budget code. See [What is a budget code in Procore's WBS?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-budget-code-in-procores-wbs)
     * **DOCX**. Downloads a DOCX copy of the commitment to your web browser's specified download location.   
![Export Commitment](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bc8d72ad9d25aaec864c5102983f3958/3794736da9d15e32dfa2186278580df6/export-commitment.png?fm=webp)


#####  Legacy Content
The steps below details the steps to follow when using the legacy Commitments experience. To learn more, see [Project Financials: Modernized Experience for the Commitments Tool](https://support.procore.com/tc/procore/Legacy/Release%5FDocumentation%5FArchives/2022/Project%5FFinancials:%5FModernized%5FExperience%5Ffor%5Fthe%5FCommitments%5FTool).
### From the General Tab
  1. In the commitment, click the **General** tab.  
_Note:_ These steps also work as described from these tabs: **Subcontractor SOV** , **Invoices** , **Payments Issued** , **Related Items** , **Emails** , **Change History** , and **Advanced Settings.**
  2. In the top-right corner, choose one (1) of these options:
     * **Export > PDF**. Generates a PDF copy of the commitment and opens it in a separate browser window. You can then save the PDF to your web browser's Download location or send the document to a printer. The PDF displays the budget code. See [What is a budget code in Procore's WBS?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-budget-code-in-procores-wbs)
     * **Export > DOCX**. Downloads a DOCX copy of the commitment to your web browser's specified download location.   
![Export Commitment](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bc8d72ad9d25aaec864c5102983f3958/3794736da9d15e32dfa2186278580df6/export-commitment.png?fm=webp)


Some tabs provide additional export options.  
| **Schedule of Values**  | Export Contract Line Items (**Export > CSV**)  | Downloads a CSV copy of the line items on the commitment's Schedule of Values.  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| **Change Orders**  | Export Change Order Log (**Export > PDF**)  | Generates a PDF copy of the commitment and opens it in a separate browser window. You can then save the PDF to your web browser's Download location or send the document to a printer. This PDF displays the budget code  |  
| **RFQs**  | Export RFQ Log (**Export > PDF**)  | Generates a PDF copy of the commitment and opens it in a separate browser window. You can then save the PDF to your web browser's Download location or send the document to a printer. This PDF displays the budget code.  |  
## See Also
  * [Export a Commitments List](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/export-a-commitments-list)
  * [About the Commitments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/about-the-commitments-tool)
  * [Create Purchase Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-purchase-orders)
title: Export a Commitment
description: How to export a purchase order or subcontract to a supported file format using the project's Commitments tool.
